{{Infobox concept
| name = Consultant blacks
| introduced = Of Shadow and Sea
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Consultants]], also known as the [[Am’haranai]], are a highly efficient and reliable organization organized into a [[Guild]]. Members of this group are characterized by their lack of family names and their origins on [[Gray Island]]. They are defined by a strict adherence to orders, whether those commands come from [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]], their own [[Architects]], or their clients. While they are globally recognized as loyal servants to the [[Empire]] who cannot be bribed or coerced, they are also driven by a mercenary commitment to their contracts. [[The Guild]] is composed of various specialized roles: [[Shepherds]] focus on observation and infiltration; [[Masons]] specialize in undercover work; [[Gardeners]] are responsible for removal tasks; and the [[Council of Architects]] serves as the ruling body, consisting of diverse talents such as strategists, alchemists, and administrators. Beyond information gathering and security redesign, the [[Guild]] is rumored to maintain an order of assassins, though this connection is not widely known. Although they are masters of sabotage, information manipulation, and spying, they are considered less effective in direct combat.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Consultant blacks]] are a type of clothing.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Meia]]'s [[Consultant blacks]] are heavily invested.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c15">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] wears [[Consultant blacks]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shepherds]] wear [[Consultant blacks]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c5">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The hall was packed with people dressed in [[Consultant blacks]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
